questions.text: The SI unit of magnetic dipole moment is:
questions.explanation: Magnetic dipole moment is measured in Ampere-square meter (A·m²)

questions.text: Earth behaves as a giant magnet.
questions.explanation: Earth behaves as a giant magnet with magnetic north and south poles. This is why a compass needle points north-south.

questions.text: Materials which are weakly repelled by magnets are called ________.
questions.explanation: Diamagnetic materials are weakly repelled by magnets. Examples: copper, gold, water.

questions.correctAnswer: Magnetic declination is the angle between magnetic north and geographic north at a place.
questions.explanation: Magnetic declination (θ) is the angle between the magnetic meridian and geographic meridian at a place.
